languages.original_text: "It bears a monstrous resemblance to something I have seen before... I recognise the hallmarks of the Inquisition, without a doubt. Sacrificing dozens of powerful but untrained minds to grasp the unknown, and then destroying the attained knowledge because it was too dangerous."

languages.text: "Чудовищное сходство с виденным ранее... Без сомнения, я узнаю почерк Инквизиции. Бросить десятки могучих, но неподготовленных умов на постижение неизведанного, а затем уничтожить полученное знание, ибо оно оказалось чрезмерно опасным".
languages.translation_comment: [string] Только если завершен Q2 Манипулуса (были на Амсанкте)

languages.text: "It bears a monstrous resemblance to something I have seen before... I recognise the hallmarks of the Inquisition, without a doubt. Sacrificing dozens of powerful but untrained minds to grasp the unknown, and then destroying the attained knowledge because it was too dangerous."
languages.original_text: "Чудовищное сходство с виденным ранее... Без сомнения, я узнаю почерк Инквизиции. Бросить десятки могучих, но неподготовленных умов на постижение неизведанного, а затем уничтожить полученное знание, ибо оно оказалось чрезмерно опасным".

traits.locale_text: "It bears a monstrous resemblance to something I have seen before... I recognise the hallmarks of the Inquisition, without a doubt. Sacrificing dozens of powerful but untrained minds to grasp the unknown, and then destroying the attained knowledge because it was too dangerous."

"It bears a monstrous resemblance to something I have seen before... I recognise the hallmarks of the Inquisition, without a doubt. Sacrificing dozens of powerful but untrained minds to grasp the unknown, and then destroying the attained knowledge because it was too dangerous."

"It bears a monstrous resemblance to something I have seen before... I recognise the hallmarks of the Inquisition, without a doubt. Sacrificing dozens of powerful but untrained minds to grasp the unknown, and then destroying the attained knowledge because it was too dangerous."

languages.text: «Tiene cierto parecido monstruoso con algo que ya vi una vez... Las huellas de la Inquisición son inconfundibles. Sacrificar decenas de mentes poderosas pero sin entrenar para comprender lo desconocido y después destruir el conocimiento adquirido porque era demasiado peligroso».
languages.original_text: "It bears a monstrous resemblance to something I have seen before... I recognise the hallmarks of the Inquisition, without a doubt. Sacrificing dozens of powerful but untrained minds to grasp the unknown, and then destroying the attained knowledge because it was too dangerous."

traits.locale_text: «Tiene cierto parecido monstruoso con algo que ya vi una vez... Las huellas de la Inquisición son inconfundibles. Sacrificar decenas de mentes poderosas pero sin entrenar para comprender lo desconocido y después destruir el conocimiento adquirido porque era demasiado peligroso».

languages.text: 「それは、私が以前に見た何かに、おぞましいほど似ています……間違いなく、異端審問会の特徴を見て取れます。未知を把握するために、強力だが訓練を受けていない数十もの精神を犠牲にし、そして得られた知識が危険すぎるという理由で、それを破壊する」
languages.original_text: "It bears a monstrous resemblance to something I have seen before... I recognise the hallmarks of the Inquisition, without a doubt. Sacrificing dozens of powerful but untrained minds to grasp the unknown, and then destroying the attained knowledge because it was too dangerous."

traits.locale_text: 「それは、私が以前に見た何かに、おぞましいほど似ています……間違いなく、異端審問会の特徴を見て取れます。未知を把握するために、強力だが訓練を受けていない数十もの精神を犠牲にし、そして得られた知識が危険すぎるという理由で、それを破壊する」

languages.text: “它和我曾见过的某种东西极其相似……我认出了审判庭的印记，这点毫无疑问。牺牲数十个强大却未经训练的心智去触碰未知，然后又因为获得的知识过于危险而将其彻底销毁。”
languages.original_text: "It bears a monstrous resemblance to something I have seen before... I recognise the hallmarks of the Inquisition, without a doubt. Sacrificing dozens of powerful but untrained minds to grasp the unknown, and then destroying the attained knowledge because it was too dangerous."

traits.locale_text: “它和我曾见过的某种东西极其相似……我认出了审判庭的印记，这点毫无疑问。牺牲数十个强大却未经训练的心智去触碰未知，然后又因为获得的知识过于危险而将其彻底销毁。”

languages.text: "Es hat eine monströse Ähnlichkeit mit etwas, das ich schon einmal gesehen habe ... Ich erkenne die Handschrift der Inquisition zweifelsfrei. Erst opfert sie Dutzende mächtige, aber untrainierte Seelen, um das Unbekannte zu erfassen, und dann zerstört sie das erlangte Wissen, weil es zu gefährlich ist."
languages.original_text: "It bears a monstrous resemblance to something I have seen before... I recognise the hallmarks of the Inquisition, without a doubt. Sacrificing dozens of powerful but untrained minds to grasp the unknown, and then destroying the attained knowledge because it was too dangerous."

traits.locale_text: "Es hat eine monströse Ähnlichkeit mit etwas, das ich schon einmal gesehen habe ... Ich erkenne die Handschrift der Inquisition zweifelsfrei. Erst opfert sie Dutzende mächtige, aber untrainierte Seelen, um das Unbekannte zu erfassen, und dann zerstört sie das erlangte Wissen, weil es zu gefährlich ist."

languages.text: « J'ai un horrible sentiment de familiarité... Je reconnais bien là l'Inquisition. Sacrifier des dizaines d'esprits puissants mais inexpérimentés pour sonder l'inconnu, puis détruire les connaissances obtenues à cause de leur dangerosité... »
languages.original_text: "It bears a monstrous resemblance to something I have seen before... I recognise the hallmarks of the Inquisition, without a doubt. Sacrificing dozens of powerful but untrained minds to grasp the unknown, and then destroying the attained knowledge because it was too dangerous."

traits.locale_text: « J'ai un horrible sentiment de familiarité... Je reconnais bien là l'Inquisition. Sacrifier des dizaines d'esprits puissants mais inexpérimentés pour sonder l'inconnu, puis détruire les connaissances obtenues à cause de leur dangerosité... »

languages.text: "Daha önce gördüğüm bir şeye korkunç derecede benziyor... Şüphesiz Engizisyon'un özelliklerini tanıyorum. Bilinmeyeni kavramak için onlarca güçlü ama eğitimsiz zihni feda etmek ve sonra çok tehlikeli olduğu için elde edilen irfanı yok etmek."
languages.original_text: "It bears a monstrous resemblance to something I have seen before... I recognise the hallmarks of the Inquisition, without a doubt. Sacrificing dozens of powerful but untrained minds to grasp the unknown, and then destroying the attained knowledge because it was too dangerous."
